user_query: I'm organizing a music-themed party and I need a diverse playlist with songs from different genres. Get me the track details of the songs by the artists 'Ed Sheeran', 'Taylor Swift', and 'Beyoncé'. Also, find an album from Apple Music and give me the details of a random track from that album.

TaskList.description: Retrieve track details for songs by Ed Sheeran.
Retrieve track details for songs by Taylor Swift.
Retrieve track details for songs by Beyoncé.
Find an album from Apple Music.
Get details of a random track from the album found in step 4.
